name: Clean Fuel Production Registration

eligibility.description: Producers of biodiesel, sustainable aviation fuel, or other clean fuels must register with the Secretary to be eligible for associated tax credits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Mandatory registration that enables producers to claim the Clean Fuel Production Credit (45Z), Sustainable Aviation Fuel Credit (40B), and Biodiesel/Alcohol credits.
